zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Root於大約1555年出生在英國素可馬雷斯費爾德時，他的父親John Root36歲，母親Joanna Turke30歲。他於大約1562年與Ann Burrell在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年4月5日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Root于大约1555年出生在英国素可馬雷斯費爾德时，他的父亲John Root36岁，母亲Joanna Turke30岁。他于大约1562年与Ann Burrell在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年4月5日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

nameMeanings.name: Root
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for a cheerful person, from an unrecorded Middle English rote (Old English rōt) ‘glad, cheerful’.

English: from Middle English rote, route, rotte ‘rote’ (of uncertain origin but apparently ultimately akin to Welsh crwth), perhaps used for a player of the medieval stringed instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. Compare Rutter .
English: perhaps a habitational name from Wroot (Lincolnshire), from Old English wrōt ‘snout, spur of land’.

variants.name: Rooth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rowarth in New Mills (Derbyshire), from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Rutter
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French roteor, roteeur, routeeur ‘player on the rote’, a musical instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. The regular modern development of the name would have been to Roter (rhyming with boater), and to Router or Rowter (rhyming with doubter). These variants survive in small numbers, but the principal modern form is Rutter, found in fairly large numbers across England, especially in the northeast and in the West Midlands. The shortened vowel in Rutter may have been influenced by rotte, rutte, Middle English variants of Old French rote. Compare Root 2.

English: nickname from Middle English roter, rotour ‘robber, plunderer’, also ‘scoundrel, lecher’, a borrowing of Old French rotier, Anglo-Norman French routier ‘soldier of fortune; robber, highwayman, ruffian’, though this is a less likely source of the modern surname.
Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch rut(t)er ‘freebooter, footpad’, cognate with 2 above.

variants.name: Rutt
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Root  .
German (Rütt): from a short form of the personal name Rudolf .

variants.name: Roots
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Root , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Root was born about 1555, in Maresfield, Sussex, England, his father, John Root, was 36 and his mother, Joanna Turke, was 30. He married Ann Burrell about 1562, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 5 April 1609, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Badby, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Rootが約1555年にイギリススセックスマレスフィールドで生まれた時，父John Rootは36歳，母Joanna Turkeは30歳であった。約1562年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでAnn Burrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年4月5日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで55歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Root(이)가 대략 1555년 영국 수세스 마스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Root(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Turke(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1562년 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 Ann Burrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 4월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Root родился около 1555 г. в местности маресфиелд, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Root было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Turke, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Burrell около 1562 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 5 апреля 1609 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия.
